Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BUREAU OF INDIAN AFFAIRS NORTHWEST REGION TRIBAL GOVERNMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Information and referral for Native American tribes in the Northwest to programs and services such as social services, natural resource and infrastructure maintenance and management, economic development programs, housing programs, law enforcement services, educational and vocational opportunities, court services, etc. 911 NE 11th Avenue Portland, OR 972324169 Eligibility: Tribal members or others who are in to resources that address social factors affecting health and provide culturally relevant health education and health policy advocacy.
